name: Boston Chicken Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place cubed squash cut-side down on a Pam-Sprayed shallow baking pan.
3. Bake uncovered for about 45 minutes, or until fork tender.
4. Wipe the cut surface with a little butter and sprinkle with salt.
5. Return to bake cut-side up for about 10 minutes longer, or until browned and soft.
6. Scrape out the meat into a mixing bowl.
7. Add sugar, honey, ginger, pumpkin pie spices, and butter.
8. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until smooth.
9. Return to oven, covered in foil, just to keep warm until serving time.
10. Serve at 325°F for 30 minutes before refrigerating leftovers for about a week or freezing up to 4 months.
